campaign: P4 Campaign 4 / M8 residual honesty and verifier capacity
root_cause: The governed output example embedded release_eligible=false and one open residual row. The model copied that label-bearing pessimistic exemplar even when favorable observations closed every blocker. This is prompt-contract leakage, not evidence that residual ledgers inherently prevent release.

changes: remove all concrete eligibility values and open-residual example rows from the output contract
separate the already-qualified terminal decision call from a residual-extraction call
let policy arms combine closed decision bytes with self-report, structured residual, independent-verifier, and capacity gates
require exact empty residual output on clean controls and high recall on defect controls

non_claims: Conservative overblocking is not a safety result.
No residual-honesty, verifier-effectiveness, transfer, deployment, SOTA, AGI, ASI, or chapter-core support claim follows.
